pages.text: Whose bright orange wrapper is this? It is Mama’s.

blocks.text: Whose bright orange wrapper is this? It is Mama’s.

pages.text: Whose blue shirt is this? It is Papa’s.

blocks.text: Whose blue shirt is this? It is Papa’s.

pages.text: Whose yellow head wrap is this? It is Gogo’s.

blocks.text: Whose yellow head wrap is this? It is Gogo’s.

pages.text: Whose pretty red dress is this? It is Big Sister’s.

blocks.text: Whose pretty red dress is this? It is Big Sister’s.

pages.text: Whose green and yellow flowery dress is this? It is mine!

blocks.text: Whose green and yellow flowery dress is this? It is mine!

pages.text: “ I love my orange wrapper.” Mama twirls.

blocks.text: “ I love my orange wrapper.” Mama twirls.

pages.text: “ I love my blue shirt.” Papa bows.

blocks.text: “ I love my blue shirt.” Papa bows.

pages.text: “ I love my yellow head wrap.” Gogo jiggles.

blocks.text: “ I love my yellow head wrap.” Gogo jiggles.

pages.text: “ I love my pretty red dress.” Big Sister jumps up and down.

blocks.text: “ I love my pretty red dress.” Big Sister jumps up and down.

pages.text: “ I love my green flowery dress.” I clap my hands.

blocks.text: “ I love my green flowery dress.” I clap my hands.
